title: Mortality.
content:
O Nicias, not for us alone
    Was laughing Eros born,
    Nor shines alone for us the moon,
    Nor burns the ruddy morn;
    Alas! to-morrow lies not in the ken
    Of us who are, O Nicias, mortal men!
meaning:
"Mortality." is a quintessential example of Eugene Field's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
